dismissalText.commentary: Quinton de Kock c & b Rabada 13 (11b 1x4 1x6 16m) SR: 118.18

dismissalComment.html: Rabada's got his second! Rabada went even shorter, cramped QdK with a ball rising at him outside off. He goes for a hoick but the top-edge flies in the air. Rabada pouches this near the short leg area. MI in early trouble

dismissalText.commentary: Danish Malewar lbw b Rabada 2 (4b 0x4 0x6 8m) SR: 50

dismissalComment.html: Speared in right on the pads. Malewar looks clueless as he tries to lift this one off a good length, but it thuds right into his pads. Never looked like connecting on this one, and he's almost listless as he walks off, once the ump's finger is up. That didn't last long...

dismissalText.commentary: Suryakumar Yadav b Rabada 15 (10b 1x4 1x6 11m) SR: 150

dismissalComment.html: Absolute ripper, splays all three stumps on the ground! And it's 152.1 clicks - third 150-plus ball of the over! Pace is pace, yaar... Pushes this just a little fuller, and angles this in ever so slightly. SKY, confident from his previous shots, looks to launch this straight down the ground with a cover drive. The ball nips away and goes through bat and ball

dismissalText.commentary: Hardik Pandya c Phillips b Mohammed Siraj 15 (16b 1x4 0x6 39m) SR: 93.75

dismissalComment.html: Phillips adds to his collection of screamers! Siraj with a 140kph full toss, low on leg. Pandya looks to jab it away and it's to Phillips' right. Pandya didn't hit it well enough but could have banked on the placement doing the job, but Phillips is one of the quickest in the deep and he puts in the dive to take it. It's probably not among the most difficult catches he's taken, but a very good one nonetheless. Pandya's struggles come to an end

dismissalText.commentary: Hardik Pandya c Phillips b Mohammed Siraj 15 (16b 1x4 0x6 39m) SR: 93.75

dismissalComment.html: Phillips adds to his collection of screamers! Siraj with a 140kph full toss, low on leg. Pandya looks to jab it away and it's to Phillips' right. Pandya didn't hit it well enough but could have banked on the placement doing the job, but Phillips is one of the quickest in the deep and he puts in the dive to take it. It's probably not among the most difficult catches he's taken, but a very good one nonetheless. Pandya's struggles come to an end

dismissalText.commentary: Mohammed Siraj lbw b Ghazanfar 0 (3b 0x4 0x6 2m) SR: 0

dismissalComment.html: Rapped on the pads and up goes the finger! Siraj sends this up. Looked plumb to me as Siraj missed a slog. No bat on that by a mile. And that's crashing into middle and leg, so Mumbai Indians end their losing streak with a 99-run win, the biggest this season by runs. Mumbai Indians are off the bottom of the table, thanks to Tilak Varma's stunning come-from-behind century and a commanding bowling display.

Mumbai Indians are off the bottom of the table, thanks to Tilak Varma's stunning come-from-behind century and a commanding bowling display.
